english translation text: Ziyar'at of Ashura

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You,
O Aba-`Abdullah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You,
O son of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خَيرَتِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ اَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You,
O son of the Commander of the Faithful
and son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

Peace be upon You,
O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلاَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ
english translation text: Peace be upon You and upon the souls that resided in Your courtyard.

arabic text: عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيعاً سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ اَبَداً
english translation text: Peace of Allah be upon all of You from me forever
as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
O Aba-`Abdillah,
unbearable is the sorrow
and excruciating and unbearable is the misfortune of You
for us and for all the people of Islam.
Excruciating and unbearable has been Your misfortune

arabic text: فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ اَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ
english translation text: in the heavens for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

arabic text: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً اَسَّسَتْ اَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ
english translation text: So, may Allah withhold His mercy from the people who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against You…
…O Members of the Household.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
english translation text: May Allah withhold His mercy from the people who drove You away from your position

arabic text: وَاَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
english translation text: and removed You away from Your ranks that Allah has put You in.
May Allah withhold His mercy from the people who slew You.
May Allah withhold His mercy from those who paved the way for them to do so
and who made possible for them to fight against You.
I repudiate them in the presence of Allah and You
and I repudiate their devotees, followers, and loyalists.
O Aba-`Abdullah,
I am at peace with those who are at peace with You

arabic text: وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
english translation text: and I am at war against those who have fought against You up to the Resurrection Day.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
english translation text: May Allah also withhold His mercy from the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan.
May Allah also withhold His mercy from the descendants of Umayyah altogether.
May Allah also withhold His mercy from the son of Marj¡nah.
May Allah also withhold His mercy from `Umar the son of Sa`d.
May Allah also withhold His mercy from Shimr.
May Allah also withhold His mercy from the people who saddled up, gave reins to their horses,
and masked their faces in preparation for fighting against You.
May my father and mother be ransoms for You.
Extremely insufferable is my commiserations with You;

arabic text: فَاَسْاَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي اَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَاَكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
english translation text: so, I beseech Allah Who has honored Your position and honored me because of You
to endue me with the chance to avenge You

arabic text: مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ مِنْ اَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: with a (Divinely) supported leader from the Household of Mu¦ammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
O Allah, (please) make me illustrious in Your sight

arabic text: بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
english translation text: in the name of Al-Husayn, peace be upon him, in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Aba-`Abdullah,

arabic text: إِنِّي اَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ
english translation text: I do seek nearness to Allah, to His Messenger,
to the Commander of the Faithful, to Fatimah,
to Al-Hasan, and to You by means of loyalty to You
and by means of repudiation of those who fought against You
and incurred Your hostility,

arabic text: وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِمَّنْ اَسَّسَ اَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ
english translation text: and repudiation of those who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against You all.
I also repudiate, in the presence of Allah and His Messenger,
those who laid the basis of all that,
established their foundations on it,

arabic text: وَجَرَىٰ فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعلىٰ اَشْيَاعِكُمْ
english translation text: and continued in wronging and persecuting You and Your adherents.
In the presence of Allah and You all do I repudiate these.
And I seek nearness to Allah and then to You all
by means of declaring loyalty to You and to Your loyalists
and declaring repudiation of Your enemies
and those who incur animosity of You
and repudiation of their adherents and followers.
I am verily at peace with those who have been at peace with You,
I am at war against those who fought against You,
loyalist to those who have been loyalist to You,
and enemy of those who have shown enmity towards You.
So, I beseech Allah Who has endued me with the honour of recognizing You
and recognizing Your loyalists
and Who conferred upon me with repudiation of Your enemies,

arabic text: اَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
english translation text: to include me with You in this world and in the Hereafter

arabic text: وَاَنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ
english translation text: and to make firm step of honesty for me with You
in this world and in the Hereafter.

arabic text: وَاَسْاَلُهُ اَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: I also beseech Him to make me attain the praiseworthy status that You enjoy with Allah
and to bestow upon me with the chance to take my own vengeance
with a leader of true guidance who is (Divinely) sustained
and expressing the truth from among You.
I also beseech Allah in Your names
and in the name of the standing that You enjoy with Him
to recompense me for my commiserations for You
with the most favorite thing that He ever gives as compensation for misfortunes that has afflicted anyone.
Your misfortune has been so astounding
and so catastrophic for Islam
and for all the heavens and the entire earth.
O Allah, (please) make me in this situation of mine

arabic text: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
english translation text: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: O Allah, (please) make me live my lifetime in the same way as Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household lived
and make me die on the same principles on which Muhammad and Mu¦ammad’s Household died.
O Allah, this day
has been regarded as blessed day by the descendants of Umayyah
and by the son of the liver-eater woman,
the accursed and son of the accursed
by the tongue of You and by the tongue of Your Prophet,
Allah’s peace be upon him,
on every occasion and in every situation,

arabic text: وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: which Your Prophet, Allah’s peace be upon him, attended.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ اَبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ
english translation text: O Allah, withhold Your mercy to Aba-Sufyan, Mu`awiyah, and Yazid son of Mu`awiyah.
May You withhold Your mercy from them incessantly and everlastingly.

arabic text: وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
english translation text: This is the day on which the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan gloated
because they had killed Al-Husayn, Allah’s blessings be upon him.
So, O Allah, frequently withhold Your mercy from them
and double for them the painful chastisement.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
english translation text: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You on this day,
on this occasion,
and on all the days of my lifetime,
by repudiating these and invoking You withhold Your mercy from them,
and by declaring loyalty to Your Prophet and Your Prophet’s Household,
peace be upon him and them.
